bottom these are called the leaf nodes they don't have any further sub trees the leaf nodes are all at the same level of the tree or the same depth of the tree this is important because this way we can guarantee that it takes the same number of steps to find every node or any value in the tree if we had one side of the tree there was just way deeper right and it was unbalanced then searching for
